title: Certified Nursing Assistant
description:
The Broad Institute advances biomedical research through genomic science. Our research has pioneered breakthroughs in cancer, infectious disease, and stem cell biology.

We're seeking a Certified Nursing Assistant to join our Research team in Indianapolis. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Provide personal care and assistance with activities of daily living for patients
Monitor and report changes in patient condition to nursing staff
Maintain patient comfort and ensure safe environment
Assist with bathing, grooming, dressing, and toileting
Document care activities and patient interactions
Support nursing staff with clinical procedures and patient transport

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; CNA certification required
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of direct patient care experience
